mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, product_id, seckill_price, status, pay_time, cancel_reason, cancel_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_order ( user_id, product_id, order_no, seckill_price, status, pay_time, cancel_reason, cancel_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderNo}, #{seckillPrice}, #{status}, #{payTime}, #{cancelReason}, #{cancelTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, product_id, seckill_price, status, pay_time, cancel_reason, cancel_time, create_time FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, product_id, seckill_price, status, pay_time, cancel_reason, cancel_time, create_time FROM seckill_order WHERE status = #{expectedStatus} AND create_time <= #{deadline} ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
